decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to utilize the combo of Goblin Charbelcher and Lotus Bloom to quickly generate massive amounts of damage and finish off your opponent. The deck also relies on a number of counterspells and disruption spells to protect your combo and control the game until you can assemble your win condition. The inclusion of cards like Sink into Stupor and Thundertrap Trainer help to further disrupt your opponent's game plan and give you time to execute your own strategy.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly through land acceleration cards like Arboreal Grazer and Simic Growth Chamber, allowing for the quick casting of big threats like Primeval Titan. By utilizing cards like Amulet of Vigor and Lotus Field, the deck can generate massive amounts of mana to overpower opponents with powerful combo plays like Scapeshift. Utilizing lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Urza's Saga, the deck can also control the board and protect its threats. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combos and overwhelm opponents with its powerful creatures and synergy.

The deck focuses on using a combination of creatures with cycling abilities to control the board and disrupt the opponent, eventually setting up for a powerful board wipe and creature revival with Living End. The key strategy involves cycling through the deck to find the necessary pieces while applying pressure with creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Shardless Agent. By utilizing efficient creature removal and disruption spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory through a well-timed Living End.

The deck focuses on using a combination of discard spells, card draw, and reanimation spells to quickly bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, overwhelming the opponent. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Faithless Looting to fill up the graveyard, then using cards such as Persist and Unearth to bring back creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, the deck aims to create a powerful board state that the opponent struggles to deal with. The deck also includes counterspells like Spell Pierce to protect its game-winning combos.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply pressure early in the game. The deck also includes powerful cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Seasoned Pyromancer to maintain board presence and deal additional damage. The inclusion of Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provides reach and removal, while cards like Arena of Glory and Thraben Charm help to protect and buff your creatures. This deck aims to win the game quickly before the opponent can establish a defense.

This deck focuses on quickly and efficiently reanimating powerful creatures from the graveyard, such as Griselbrand, using cards like Goryo's Vengeance. It also utilizes instant speed spells like Ephemerate and Solitude to disrupt opponents and protect your combo pieces. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to control the game and ensure your combos go off smoothly. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and control elements, creating a fast and explosive win condition.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana using rituals and mana-generating spells in order to cast powerful spells like Past in Flames, Grapeshot, and Ral, Monsoon Mage to create a storm of spells that overwhelm and defeat the opponent. The deck also features cards that allow for card draw and digging for key pieces of the combo. It aims to win the game in a single explosive turn by chaining spells together to create a lethal combo. The deck is built around efficiency and explosiveness to quickly win the game before the opponent can react.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence and dealing damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. It utilizes low-cost aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter, supported by spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to clear the way for attacking. The deck also includes card draw and selection cards like Preordain and Expressive Iteration to maintain momentum. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast damage and efficient card choices to secure a quick victory in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This Ruby Storm deck aims to quickly generate mana with cards like Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual, in order to cast multiple spells in one turn and eventually win the game with a massive Grapeshot or Past in Flames combo. Ral, Monsoon Mage and Wrenn's Resolve help dig through the deck for key pieces, while Valakut Awakening provides card draw and possible graveyard recursion. The deck utilizes various cantrips and card draw spells to cycle through the deck quickly and find the necessary combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent in a single explosive turn.

The deck focuses on playing aggressively with low-cost creatures and spell burn, utilizing cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Monastery Swiftspear to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also features card draw and filtering effects to maintain momentum and pressure. The goal is to play fast and efficiently, overwhelming the opponent with a combination of creatures and direct damage spells before they can set up their own game plan.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent, while also utilizing synergies with cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, supported by disruption like Blood Moon and Thraben Charm. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy, with the option to fetch for specific lands with cards like Marsh Flats and Arid Mesa.

The deck focuses on a combination of discarding and reanimating powerful creatures quickly, using cards like Thoughtseize and Faithless Looting to fill the graveyard with creatures like Emperor of Bones and Archon of Cruelty. Unearth and Persist are key cards for bringing these creatures back onto the battlefield for a powerful attack. The deck also includes control elements like Fatal Push and Spell Pierce to handle opponent threats. Overall, the strategy revolves around comboing off with reanimated creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of counter spells, removal, and card advantage to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It aims to maintain board control while grinding out advantages with card draw and powerful threats like Quantum Riddler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. A mix of efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Sheoldred's Edict help deal with opposing threats, while disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Counterspell help to protect your own game plan. Finally, finishers like Murktide Regent and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian help seal the deal once the opponent is out of resources.

The deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy, utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. The deck also includes cards that can generate card advantage and provide additional utility. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells, while also maintaining card advantage and flexibility through card draw and manipulation. The mana base is built to support the aggressive strategy while also providing the necessary colors for the spells in the deck.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with an aggressive playstyle, utilizing artifacts and creatures to establish board presence. Cards like Urza's Saga, Mox Opal, and Engineered Explosives provide mana acceleration and board control, while creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary put pressure on opponents. The inclusion of Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager allows for synergy with artifacts, increasing versatility and potential threats. The deck aims to maintain a fast pace and disruptive strategy to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game with a combination of powerful Eldrazi creatures and ramp spells, allowing for early plays of Emrakul, the Promised End and other big threats. Utilizing cards like Ugin, the Great Creator and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also generating mana quickly with Eldrazi Temple and Utopia Sprawl. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures and powerful spells, while also having answers to threats with cards like Kozilek's Return and Lightning Bolt.
